mapper.select: SELECT level, COUNT(*) AS count FROM award WHERE level IS NOT NULL GROUP BY level ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM award WHERE type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY type ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT student_name AS studentName, COUNT(*) AS awardCount, SUM(bonus) AS totalBonus FROM award GROUP BY student_name ORDER BY awardCount DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT SUM(bonus) AS totalBonus, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, ROUND(AVG(bonus), 2) AS avgBonus FROM award WHERE bonus IS NOT NULL
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(award_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM award WHERE award_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(award_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month DESC LIMIT 12
